statements.impact_statement: Payment service uses UriComponentsBuilder for Stripe callback URL construction. SSRF to internal metadata service confirmed via threat model TM-EC3-004.
statements.action_statement: Upgrade to Spring Boot 3.2.4+ which patches CVE-2024-22259. Add URL scheme and hostname allowlist.

statements.impact_statement: Auth service login redirect uses UriComponentsBuilder to construct redirect URLs from user input. Matches CVE pattern.
statements.action_statement: Upgrade to Spring Boot 3.2.3+ and implement domain allowlist for redirect URLs.

statements.impact_statement: Admin controller endpoint uses HttpServletRequest.getRemoteUser() which returns null for unauthenticated requests, bypassing authorization.
statements.action_statement: Replace getRemoteUser() with SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication(). Upgrade Spring Security.

statements.impact_statement: AWS Fargate manages the underlying runtime and patched runc in February 2024. ECS Fargate tasks are not affected because customers do not control the container runtime.
statements.action_statement: No action required. AWS manages Fargate runtime patching.

statements.impact_statement: Container base images use Amazon Linux 2023 which ships xz 5.4.x, not affected versions 5.6.0/5.6.1.
statements.action_statement: Verify base image xz version via 'xz --version'. Pin to Amazon Linux 2023 images.

statements.impact_statement: ElastiCache Redis 7.1 may be affected. AWS has not confirmed patch status for managed Redis. Session data at risk if exploited.
statements.action_statement: Contact AWS support to confirm Redis engine version. Enable encryption in transit as defense-in-depth.

statements.impact_statement: Cryptography library uses OpenSSL backend, not GnuTLS. RSA-PSK key exchange not used in application.
statements.action_statement: No action required. Monitor for OpenSSL-specific advisories.
